case_title: CLAIRE SANDRA FARBER VS. DAVID RAMIREZ DDS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK: S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARBER, CLAIRE SANDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DDS, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
